descriptionText: Designs consumer electronics, software, and services spanning hardware platforms and recurring subscriptions.
Operates internet-scale platforms across search, advertising, cloud computing, and adjacent technologies.
Electric vehicles, energy generation and storage products, autonomy-related software, and manufacturing scale-up.
Global ecommerce marketplace, fulfillment logistics, advertising, cloud infrastructure via AWS, and devices.
Software productivity platforms, developer tooling, gaming content, devices, and hybrid cloud infrastructure.
Accelerated computing GPUs and platforms powering gaming, AI training/inference, robotics, and simulation.
Social technologies connecting communities with messaging, immersive hardware exploration, and advertising systems.
Subscription streaming entertainment producing localized originals across genres and languages worldwide.
Enterprise CRM platform spanning sales automation, service workflows, commerce integrations, and analytics.
Enterprise databases, middleware applications, engineered hardware profiles, and cloud infrastructure offerings.
Creative software franchises, digital marketing suites, document workflows, and cloud monetization offerings.
Audio streaming distribution combining personalized discovery with creator tooling and marketplace subscriptions.
High-performance CPUs and GPUs spanning PCs, consoles, data centers, and embedded acceleration workloads.
Processors and adjacent silicon enabling PCs, networking gear, edge deployments, and manufacturing ecosystems.
Hybrid cloud consulting, automation software stacks, secured infrastructure modernization services.
Enterprise applications orchestrating finance, procurement, HR processes with modular cloud transformations.
Digital workflows connecting IT operations, employee experiences, customer engagement automation surfaces.
Elastic cloud data warehouse separating compute from storage enabling governed analytics collaborations.
Digital payments rails spanning wallets, merchant acquiring tools, installment offerings, risk orchestration.
Commerce OS coupling storefront tooling, checkout acceleration, fulfillment integrations for merchants globally.
DRAM and NAND memory solutions powering smartphones, PCs, automotive electronics, hyperscale deployments.
Wireless modem technology licensing alongside Snapdragon platforms advancing connectivity ecosystems.
Consumer banking footprint complementing wealth advisories, trading desks, treasury operations nationwide.
Integrated storytelling franchises spanning studios, parks experiences, cruise itineraries, streaming portfolios.
Global beverage concentrate portfolio distributing sparkling variants plus hydration adjacent innovations.
